file_insights.changes: Added three security-focused dependencies: subtle (2), tower (0.4 with util feature), tower_governor (0.4). Moved tower from dev-dependencies to regular dependencies.
file_insights.significance: Architectural shift: rate limiting and constant-time comparison logic now part of core binary, not just testing infrastructure.
file_insights.dependency_chain: tower (middleware framework) + tower_governor (rate limiting governor) + subtle (constant-time ops) form cohesive security layer

patterns_discovered.description: Three complementary security crates added together: subtle for cryptographic constant-time operations, tower for middleware chain, tower_governor for request rate limiting
patterns_discovered.implication: Suggests implementation of rate-limited, timing-attack-resistant endpoints (likely in serve.rs context)

patterns_discovered.description: tower moved from [dev-dependencies] to [dependencies], indicating it's now essential for runtime behavior
patterns_discovered.implication: Rate limiting/middleware is now production-critical, not just test infrastructure

gotchas_discovered.description: tower's move from dev-dependencies to regular dependencies lacks explicit rationale in commit/diff
gotchas_discovered.risk: Future maintainers may not understand why middleware is production-critical; could lead to accidental removal or version downgrade

gotchas_discovered.description: subtle (2) and tower_governor (0.4) are not pinned to patch versions; minor version bumps could alter security behavior
gotchas_discovered.risk: Rate limiting thresholds or constant-time guarantees could change unexpectedly on dependency updates

discoveries.approach_outcome: SUCCESS - Straightforward dependency addition. Single commit, no conflicts. Task completed as specified with clear naming convention (auto-claude: subtask-1-1-dependencies).
recommendations: Add inline comment in Cargo.toml explaining tower's promotion: '# rate limiting middleware, required for production server'
Lock subtle and tower_governor to specific patch versions if security properties are version-sensitive (e.g., subtle = "=2.4.1")
Add integration tests in crates/bop-cli/tests/ to verify rate limiter behavior and constant-time comparison under load
Document the serve.rs security model (rate limiting strategy, which endpoints are protected) in codebase or CONTRIBUTING.md
